summary: Tightened the chapter 9 to chapter 10 handoff by carrying Halima's market-bag grip into the lodge opening and shifting the first beat onto the trapped end-of-day pause. The folder-flap bridge into chapter 11 was already doing its job, so the exit beat stayed intact.
edits: Carried forward Halima's hand hooked through the market-bag handles in the opening paragraph.
Shifted the opening temporal frame to the end-of-day stasis so the entry differs more clearly from the next chapter's public-space opening.
